overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk walk through Night City. The player traverses a covered industrial walkway, crosses a wet intersection with neon billboards, and approaches a modern commercial building with a distinctive colorful LED pedestrian bridge. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with glowing advertisements, wet reflective surfaces, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside industrial concrete wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath overhead metal structures, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction under the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass structure with fluorescent lighting covering the pedestrian path
tall gray concrete wall with metal railings and barbed wire on top
tall digital tower displaying 08 and various advertisements against the dusk sky
palm trees visible in the distance along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered industrial walkway in a cyberpunk city. The path is sheltered by a metal overhead structure with fluorescent lights, while a tall concrete wall runs along the right side. Digital billboards are visible in the distance ahead, and a few pedestrians walk in the same direction. Vehicles pass by on the wet street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with digital billboards and crosswalks

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with large illuminated digital billboards
turns right and begins crossing the multi-lane wet asphalt street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the wet asphalt road toward the commercial district with large billboards

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying cherry blossom imagery and advertisements
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the wet reflective asphalt
large modern commercial building with illuminated facade visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a wide-open urban intersection at dusk. Large digital billboards dominate the view, including a prominent one with cherry blossom imagery. The camera turns right and crosses the wet street, navigating around a passing black sedan. The industrial wall and covered walkway fall behind as the scene opens up to the commercial district ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with modern architecture and LED pedestrian bridge

events.description: completes street crossing and enters area dominated by modern commercial architecture with colorful lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward a modern building with a distinctive colorful LED pedestrian overpass, passing palm trees and various digital signage

entered.detail: pedestrian overpass connecting two buildings, covered in glitching rainbow LED strips that change colors
large vertical digital screen displaying pink and red advertisements on a metal frame
row of palm trees lining the left side of the street with decorative lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach toward a striking modern commercial building featuring a pedestrian bridge wrapped in glitching rainbow LED lights. The camera walks along a palm-tree-lined street with various digital billboards on the left. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from the overpass and surrounding signage. The scene is purely urban with parked vehicles visible on the right and the distinctive architecture growing larger as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial corridor into the vibrant, neon-lit heart of a commercial district at dusk. It begins with a walk along a covered walkway under fluorescent lights, flanked by a concrete wall while vehicles pass on the wet street to the right. As the camera exits the overhead structure, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by massive digital billboards, including one featuring cherry blossoms, before turning right to cross the reflective pavement. The environment then shifts toward a more polished commercial zone lined with palm trees and glowing signage, with the camera advancing toward a modern building. Finally, the view culminates in the approach to a pedestrian bridge wrapped in glitching rainbow LED lights that cast colorful reflections across the wet street.
